heading: I turn ideas into responsive web experiences.
paragraphs: Full-stack web developer with experience designing and building complete applications, from backend architecture to frontend interfaces. Focused on performance, usability, and clean, maintainable code.

highlights.title: Clean builds
highlights.text: Readable React components, practical state, and APIs that stay easy to maintain.

highlights.title: Full stack flow
highlights.text: Comfortable moving from UI polish to Express routes and MongoDB data models.

highlights.title: Product mindset
highlights.text: Focused on shipping interfaces that solve real problems, not just look finished.

experience.description: Building MERN stack applications with attention to responsive layouts, reusable components, database-backed features, and practical deployment.
